![](/wiki/File:Some_Indian_Vegetables_by_Dr_Raju_Kasambe_DSCN7726_(4)_06.jpg)

Assortment of vegetables

Cookbook | Recipes | Ingredients | Equipment | Techniques | Cookbook Disambiguation Pages | Ingredients  | Vegetables | Basic Foodstuffs

The **vegetables** commonly used in cooking are listed below. Note that some vegetables that are botanically fruits are still considered to be vegetables in the culinary sense and are listed here.

## Index

[edit | edit source]

For a complete list of vegetables, see Category:Vegetables or browse below:
